## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss marketing leadership hiring needs for Medallion and explore potential candidates.](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Medallion seeks to hire a demand generation leader and a product marketing leader to support their head of marketing](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Marcel shared insights on identifying high-potential marketing candidates, emphasizing resourcefulness and T-shaped skill sets](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Medallion is growing rapidly (70% this year, aiming for $50M next year) and needs support in pipeline generation for large enterprise deals](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Marcel offered to introduce Abdullah, a potential candidate with relevant experience, to Derek](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Recent Career Shift

  - [Launched growthax.ai, reaching $2M ARR in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Left Deep Graham after 24x-ing their traffic using AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Now has 15 employees and a new office in Mission Rock, San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Demand Generation Hiring Strategy

  - [Focus on candidates with a "position of strength" (e.g., technical skills, data expertise, go-to-market experience)](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Look for T-shaped professionals who've been promoted or asked to fix other areas](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Seek resourceful individuals with diverse experiences, not just those who've repeated the same role](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Consider candidates from agencies or those who've shown initiative in workshops/presentations](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Potential Candidates and Networking

  - [Shared profiles of successful hires like Nino (now at Anthropic) and Brian (CMO at Service)](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Offered to introduce Abdullah, a strong technical candidate currently transitioning out of metadata.io](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Suggested trying a "try before you buy" approach with potential hires](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)

### Medallion's Growth and Challenges

  - [Currently at \~$30M, aiming for $50M next year (70% growth)](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Focus on large enterprise deals](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Need support in pipeline generation and meeting sales goals](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### Marcel's Approach to Enterprise Marketing

  - [Create exclusive events focused on high-level speakers rather than general audience](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Foster public associations with industry leaders to influence deal-making](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Organize intimate, high-end dinners and experiences to create FOMO and network effects](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Balance expensive, long-term relationship-building tactics with immediate ROI activities](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### Work Culture and Personal Growth

  - [Marcel left Scale AI due to impending layoffs and lack of investment in marketing](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of positive work culture and personal well-being over financial gains](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Building growthax.ai with a focus on creating a non-toxic work environment](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Derek to consider the introduction to Abdullah as a potential candidate](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Marcel to send an introduction email connecting Derek and Abdullah](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Plan for an in-person meeting in the coming months to discuss further and potentially explore collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Derek to consider joining one of Marcel's intimate dinner or breakfast networking events in the future](https://fathom.video/share/x-B5BvrWRrCGPqus7su7KWquNDns_fLb?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
